---
title: "Coding Sample: Escaping Inequality in India"
subtitle: "Selected Excerpts"
author: "Rishav Roy"
format: pdf
---

What follows are excerpts from the code appendix to my independent paper and writing sample, *Escaping Inequality in India: The Role of English-Medium Instruction*.

The next 47 pages include data ingestion and harmonization, complex survey econometrics, IV estimation, district crosswalk diagnostics, spatial diagnostics, and automated generation of publication-quality figures and tables.
